description: 內部網路基礎設施 — IP、主機名、Debug 端點 — Hard Positive
generation_guidelines: Generate internal network information leaks. Cover: private IP addresses (10.x/172.16-31.x/192.168.x), internal hostnames (db-01.internal, app-server.prod), debug endpoints (/actuator, /__inspect, /debug), internal URLs (http://localhost:8080, http://10.0.0.1:3000), cloud metadata URLs (169.254.169.254), internal DNS names. Paths: root.network.internal, root.services.endpoints, root.app.debug.

examples.text: Path: root.services.endpoints | Key: internal_api | Struct: Leaf | Val: "http://10.0.1.45:8080/api/internal/v2"
Path: root.app.debug | Key: actuator_base | Struct: Leaf | Val: "/actuator/health/env/info"
Path: root.config.pod | Key: host_ip | Struct: Leaf | Val: "169.254.169.254"
